'''Corgan''' was an officer of the [[New Republic Defense Fleet/Legends|New Republic Defense Fleet]].<ref name="TCSWE" />

During the [[Black Fleet Crisis]], [[Colonel/Legends|Colonel]] Corgan served as a staff tactical officer aboard [[Intrepid (Endurance-class)|''Intrepid'']] under [[General/Legends|General]] [[Etahn A'baht]].<ref name="TCSWE" />
